title: Jake Paul & Anti Fund: From Creator to Investor
content: Jake Paul and Geoff Woo announce Anti Fund's new $100 million growth fund, discussing investments in SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic, Anduril, Cognition, Etched, and Modal. They emphasize founder psychology, resilience, and how attention, culture, and distribution matter in the AI era. Paul reflects on his transition from creator to entrepreneur, athlete, and investor, while Woo shares perspectives on venture capital and AI's impact on founders.
source: The a16z Show - content+a16zpodcast@a16z.com (Erik Torenberg, Jake Paul, Geoff Woo)
eventKey: jake-paul-anti-fund-creator-investor
normalizedTitle: jake paul anti fund from creator to investor

Slow breathing increases reward sensitivity and risk-taking via parasympathetic activation. Google's IPv6 usage hit 50%, though APNIC reports 42%, reflecting measurement and deployment gaps. Constant negative news overwhelms evolutionarily unprepared brains, causing fatigue; bounded consumption helps. Developers often misconfigure CORS, creating security holes. title: (new) Bifrost Edge: MCP Visibility and Control for Enterprise Teams and Beyond 🔥
content:
Bifrost offers enterprise governance for Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers through a two-layer system. The Bifrost Gateway centralizes policies controlling model access, tool filtering, budgets, and audit logging. Bifrost Edge, a lightweight endpoint agent, enforces these policies on employee machines by routing all AI traffic through the Gateway automatically.

This provides visibility into shadow MCP deployments across organizations, enabling security teams to see which servers are connected, by whom, and what they're doing. Administrators can approve or deny specific MCP servers at the device level, with blocked connections triggering security notifications. Combined with content guardrails, the system prevents unauthorized data exposure while maintaining developer productivity.
eventKey: new-bifrost-edge-mcp-visibility-control
normalizedTitle: new bifrost edge mcp visibility and control for enterprise teams and beyond 🔥
